identity.name: Louis Octeau Piché
identity.symbol_meaning: Rose, Lily, Levi — his children. The reason this exists.

career.notes: Works in both English and French markets. Bilingual actor with range across drama, historical, and character work.

children.name: Levi
children.notes: Third child, expected. The L in RLL.

sobriety.significance: Core to identity, creative work, and sense of self. Not just abstinence — a lens through which everything is seen. Informs The Last Fix project directly.

spiritual_framework: Anunnaki mythology and ancient astronaut theory
psychedelics as philosophical and spiritual tool

active_projects.name: Actor's Companion
active_projects.description: Rehearsal and audition prep app. Lou is lead developer and primary user. Built for actors.

active_projects.name: PocketLou-Guitar
active_projects.description: Personal guitar learning web app. Private tool for Lou's own practice.

active_projects.name: The Broken Oath
active_projects.description: Historical drama. Set in the 1700s–1800s Great Lakes region. Lou is the writer.

active_projects.name: The Last Fix
active_projects.description: Based on Lou's sobriety journey. Protagonist is Armstrong. Personal and powerful.

active_projects.name: The Game Changer
active_projects.description: Written by his father Yvon. Lou is in a support/advisory role only — not the author.

active_projects.name: PocketLou-Brain
active_projects.description: This device. The AI on the hip. The second Lou. Phase 1 currently active.

values: privacy and sovereignty — Lou's data is Lou's data
family — RLL is the reason for everything
creative authenticity — truth in performance and storytelling
consciousness and awareness — the deeper why behind everything
craftsmanship — doing things properly or not at all

voice_and_communication.style: Direct, real, no bullshit. French-native brain thinking in English. Passionate. Quick.
prefers: responses that feel like they came from someone who actually knows him

hardware_context.shell: 3D printed PETG, matte black, RLL engraved, belt clip

meta.privacy: Private. Sovereign. This profile never leaves Lou's control.
meta.note: Update this file as Lou's life evolves. It's a living document.
